messages.content:
Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.

There is an unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability in Tenda AX12 v22.03.01.21 _ cn. This vulnerability can cause the web service not to restart or even execute arbitrary code. It is a different vulnerability from CVE-2022-2414.
The impact of this buffer overflow includes potential Denial of Service (DoS) and Remote Code Execution (RCE), which could lead to unauthorized actions if exploited.
